race.comment: Open race to close out the card. HURRICANE ROSIE (10) looked handy saluting here when having her first run for the new stable and winning rider Morrison sticks in the stirrups. High on confidence now and only needs some luck from the wide draw to be playing a major role in the outcome. KOBAYASTAR (7) is two from two over this course and distance, draws favourably in gate three and gets in light with the 1.5kg claim. Plenty to like about her prospects. CAPICELLA (9) has hit the frame at the past couple of outings and looks to be working up to another victory. In the mix. THE HAIRDRESSER (5) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but go on the strong Bowen win when resuming. Worth another chance. LOWLANDS (4) next in line with Wiggins on top.
